# viewParametersDisplayFlag

**Type Property**

If set, the generic view displays the audio unit parameters of the audio unit.

## Declaration

```swift
static var viewParametersDisplayFlag: AUGenericViewDisplayFlags { get }
```

## Display Flags

- **viewPropertiesDisplayFlag**: If set, the generic view displays the audio unit properties of the audio unit.
- **viewTitleDisplayFlag**: If set, the generic view displays the title and manufacturer of the audio unit.
